item.title: ‘I’m not made of money’: My heating engineer didn’t fix my radiators on his first visit. Do I pay him a second time?
item.description: “He charged $180 for the second visit for his time, including $40 for the part.”

item.title: After bitcoin’s fall, pity those wildly enthusiastic investors who borrowed billions against crypto
item.description: The speculation that bitcoin would hit $200,000 in 2025 now seems like a dream. Because it was.

item.title: Last week’s AI selloff isn’t a major warning sign for markets, Barclays says
item.description: Last week’s meltdown in risk assets doesn’t represent an inflection point for the stock market overall — or for the artificial-intelligence sector tha...

item.title: My brother-in-law invested $30K in our California condo. It has a 3% mortgage rate. He’s pushing me to sell. Is now a good time?
item.description: “We’re only breaking even because of rising HOA fees in this state.”

item.title: My husband, 73, wants to sell our $300K rental and buy an annuity. Is that wise?
item.description: “He believes the annuity will net $1,600 per month, the same as the rent from the house.”
